$comment: The only place in this repo where a model identifier may appear (outside historical docs — FableEtudes/, docs/archive/, STATUS.md's dated journal, which are never rewritten). Consumed by the CI guard workflows (wired in étude 25 lot 5). Bumping a model for a role = editing this file only. The pre-commit hook stopped consuming this file when it became a deterministic script (étude « IA → déterministe » lot L1).
